measurement_note: Size is n, the word length. Each tier is one globally ordered beautiful run with equal-size vowel groups. The one-pass group scan takes O(n) time. A correct slower implementation that starts at every position and scans forward while maintaining order and seen vowels takes O(n^2), completes all tiers, and fails only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: five vowel groups of length 5
